scripts.build:vscode: bun run sync:vscode-version && vite build --config vscode/vite.extension.config.ts && vite build --config vscode/vite.webview.config.ts && bun scripts/verify-vscode-build.ts
scripts.package:vscode: bun run build:vscode && cd vscode && bunx vsce package --no-dependencies
scripts.publish:vscode: bun run build:vscode && cd vscode && bunx vsce publish --azure-credential --no-dependencies
scripts.test:vscode: bun run test:vscode:unit && bun run build:vscode && bun run test:vscode:integration
scripts.test:scenarios:web: bun run build && bun run build:scenarios && bun run test:scenarios:web:prepared
scripts.test:scenarios:vscode: bun run build:vscode && bun run build:scenarios && bun run test:scenarios:vscode:prepared
scripts.test:scenarios: bun run build && bun run build:vscode && bun run build:scenarios && bun run test:scenarios:web:prepared && bun run test:scenarios:vscode:prepared
scripts.test:all: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test:unit && bun run build && bun run build:vscode && bun run build:scenarios && bun run test:vscode:integration && bun run test:scenarios:web:prepared && bun run test:scenarios:vscode:prepared
